name: bollinger-mean-reversion
description: Bollinger Bands mean reversion — fades price touching the outer bands, targeting a reversion to the middle band. Suited to ranging/choppy markets, not trending ones.

entry.long: price touches or crosses below the lower Bollinger Band
entry.short: price touches or crosses above the upper Bollinger Band

exit.target: price reverts to the middle Bollinger Band (SMA)
